notes:
quý means precious, valuable, dear. It describes something you care about a lot, emotionally or materially.

It’s an adjective and usually comes after the noun: người quý, món quà quý, thời gian quý. It can talk about people, relationships, time, objects, or qualities.

Very common extra meaning: quý also means quarter of the year (quý 1, quý 2, etc.) in business or dates.

Close words: quý giá (valuable, often about money/things), trân quý (deeply cherish, stronger feeling). Opposite idea: rẻ (cheap).
exampleSentences: Chiếc đồng hồ này rất quý vì là quà của ông nội anh.
Chị luôn coi thời gian bên gia đình là điều quý trong cuộc sống.
Bạn bè tốt là những người mà em luôn cảm thấy quý nhất.

content.sentence: Chúng ta rất ___ những khoảnh khắc này.

notes_md:
**quý** means *precious, valuable, dear*. It describes something you care about a lot, emotionally or materially.

It’s an adjective and usually comes after the noun: *người quý*, *món quà quý*, *thời gian quý*. It can talk about people, relationships, time, objects, or qualities.

Very common extra meaning: **quý** also means *quarter of the year* (quý 1, quý 2, etc.) in business or dates.

Close words: **quý giá** (valuable, often about money/things), **trân quý** (deeply cherish, stronger feeling). Opposite idea: **rẻ** (cheap).

definitions.vi: Quý giá; quý trọng; được đánh giá cao.

exampleSentencesTranslated: This watch is very precious because it is a gift from my grandfather.
She always considers time with family to be the most precious thing in life.
Good friends are the people I always feel are the most precious.

content.sentence: Chúng ta rất ___ những khoảnh khắc này.
